max-cognitive.name: Maximum Cognitive Complexity
max-cognitive.objective: Max function cognitive complexity from APSS functions or the local complexity adapter.

max-cyclomatic.name: Maximum Cyclomatic Complexity
max-cyclomatic.objective: Max function cyclomatic complexity from APSS functions or the local complexity adapter.

max-halstead-volume.name: Maximum Halstead Volume
max-halstead-volume.objective: Max APSS Halstead volume per function when APSS emits Halstead metrics.

max-fan-out.name: Maximum Efferent Coupling
max-fan-out.objective: Max module efferent coupling from APSS coupling or the dependency-cruiser fallback.

max-main-sequence-distance.name: Maximum Distance from Main Sequence
max-main-sequence-distance.objective: Max module distance from the Martin main sequence.

instability-out-of-range-count.name: Instability Outside Healthy Range
instability-out-of-range-count.objective: Count modules with instability below 0.1 or above 0.9.

circular-dependency-edges.name: Circular Dependency Edges
circular-dependency-edges.objective: Count of dependency edges flagged as circular by dependency-cruiser, scoped to workspace sources (ws_apps + ws_packages). Each cycle of length N contributes N edges. Source: workspace.circular_edges in the aggregate report (bead create-harness-app-2zz.1).

critical-finding-count.name: Critical Security Finding Count
critical-finding-count.objective: Count of critical-severity findings emitted by the Ultimate Bug Scanner (UBS) over template-owned source paths. The bin/sensors wrapper runs ubs --report-json scoped to a stable file list and writes the JSON to a tempfile; the gate reads totals.critical via --security=<path>. Soft-skip yields a null reading; an active scan with zero findings yields baseline 0 and the gate fails on any new critical pattern (bead create-harness-app-2zz.2).

license-violation-count.name: License Violation Count
license-violation-count.objective: Count denied or unknown license findings once a license adapter is wired.

accessibility-violation-count.name: Accessibility Violation Count
accessibility-violation-count.objective: Count accessibility violations once a web accessibility adapter is wired.

startup-benchmark-mean.name: Maximum Startup Benchmark Mean
startup-benchmark-mean.objective: Maximum hyperfine benchmark mean wall-clock from harness/perf/baseline.json. Reports the committed perf floor; the separate harness/perf gate enforces regression at pre-push with its own per-benchmark tolerance.

startup-benchmark-count.name: Startup Benchmark Count
startup-benchmark-count.objective: Number of benchmarks committed in harness/perf/baseline.json. Floor of zero is acceptable until hyperfine has produced a real measurement.

availability-failure-count.name: Availability Failure Count
availability-failure-count.objective: Count availability or resilience failures once an adapter is wired.
